counters.description: *matchup threat level is not relevant they are all ranked 5 for practicality* hard only after 6. in the recent patches akali's early-game has been heavily nerfed. she isnt a lane-bully anymore. we can easily win lane before level 6. make sure to get as much advantage as you can pre-6 in order to be able to duel her in the lv6 spike.
malzahar is also an easy matchup for irelia both pre and after level 6.
pretty hard if the yasuo knows what he is doing.
pretty easy both before and after level 6.

easy matchup. just be carefull level6 she has a lot of damage and if we are rushing blade of the ruined king we wont have a lot of hps to witstand her burst. make sure to stay healthy when near her after lv6
lee sin is now magically a midlaner as well thanks to mark yetter :)
easy matchup both pre and after 6.

synergies.description: teamfight setups and frontline + cc on basics
insane shielding and perfect for irelia since she has to dash on targets and easily use ivern's shield damage and slow
